reviews.review_title: First VR squid game that ISNT Gtag
reviews.review_description: I’m so annoyed seeing those scary baboon and gorilla tag clone games using squid game and I’ve been waiting for a realistic, show accurate approach and this is it right here! Game gets better and better with each update. Loads of potential

i played this and i believe that this game has loads of potential and with the right amount of polishing it will be a really good game so at the moment currently i would say the game is decent it just has a lot of bugs off though i like the concept and i believe it is something undone i'm really looking forward to this joystick experience and what's to come

This is THE MOST BADDEST GAME EVER SO MANY BUGS IN THE GAME WHICH MAKES THIS GAME UNPLAYABLE LIKE THE TIME ONE SINGLE PERSON DIED YES 1 SINGLE PEOPLE WE ALL DIE YES EVERY SINGLE ONE OF US DIED AND IN RED LIGHT GREEN LIGHT I DID NOT MOVE A SINGLE BIT AND I GOT SHOT AND GLASS BRIDGE ONE PERSON JUMPED AND DIED SO WE JUMPED TO THE OTHER SIDE AND DIED THE GAME IS UNPLAYABLE so I really recommend DONT GET THIS GAME WHAT SO EVER!!!!!!!!

developer_response.body:
Dear Ruboss2012,

Thank you for sharing your feedback with us. We regret to learn that your experience with the game has not met your expectations. Please be informed that the game features strict requirements for hand movement and rotation detection.

In response to the concerns raised by several players, including yourself, we will be adjusting the difficulty level of the "Red Light, Green Light" game. Our aim is to enhance the overall experience, allowing players to complete the game with greater ease.

Thank you for your understanding.

Best regards,  
PHOZE

reviews.review_title: Best squid game and has lots of potentia
reviews.review_description:
This is probably the most fun experience ive had in vr ever, The only problem is that not much people are online, but it has just released so i see why. 

you guys need to get the game its so fun it has working dalgona to
I like the game but it has many bugs like I Fall out of the map the map is broken and does Not want too load and im in the Ground barely moving please fix These bugs

Me and my brother were super excited to play a realistic VR squid game were able to play together just to be disappointed to see theres no lobby's,no people just nothing. I would've loved to see how they did dalgona but sadly again im not able to play since there's nobody there

developer_response.body:
Dear quartz340,

Thank you for your feedback. We acknowledge the low player count and are actively working on this issue by seeking sponsorships and partnerships to increase it.

Best regards,  
PHOZE

reviews.review_description: Terrible, first 2 times died during red light green light when I didn’t move, takes too long to load into the dormitory, that guy talks too long, you wait to long for red light green light, and the last time I played it didn’t even open the doors, about as worse as the original, why did you even release this.

i wCited like 10 minutes for eight players because nobody was joining and then when i finally got the players the game started and it took like another 5 minutes to finally get into the actual like red light green light and then everybody just died like i wasn't even moving or hands i was frozen when the doll said red light

developer_response.body:
Dear Galaxy33311,

Thank you for sharing your feedback with us. We regret to learn that your experience with the game has not met your expectations. Please be informed that the game features strict requirements for hand movement and rotation detection.

In response to the concerns raised by several players, including yourself, we will be adjusting the difficulty level of the "Red Light, Green Light" game. Our aim is to enhance the overall experience, allowing players to complete the game with greater ease.

Thank you for your understanding.

Best regards,  
PHOZE

reviews.review_description: Game takes forever to load up the squid games. Able to jump through walls and roofs. Optimization is terrible for quest 2 everything is lagging in and out.

developer_response.body:
Dear Ipassedthegas,

We apologize for your recent experience with the game. Please be assured that we are actively addressing the bugs you encountered, including improving colliders to prevent players from moving through walls and roofs. We are also focusing on optimization and rendering for all Quest headsets. We would appreciate it if you could consider updating your review after our next update.

Best regards,  
PHOZE

reviews.review_description: Really improved a lot since launch, the guys behind it seem really Passionate. Can't wait for more updates!
Love the game even though its a bit buggy but the dev is super hard working and kind and this game has unlimited potential cant wait to see how it turns out!
Bro its the only squid game vr and its really good and fun to play these games. When the s3 games will be out it will even be more fun W game.
First propa squid game after all bugs was fixed game was amazing definitely recommend
very cool game

Dear NoahJT8,

Best regards,

reviews.review_description: This game has so much potential! Its pretty good cause its still in beta. Its a solo developer. Its fun, no gtag movement like Ape game and its a good game download it!

reviews.review_description: I think this game is good but i have stick drift so i cant play it, and other squid game games with gtag movement are just bad, please try and add gtag movement.
THIS GAME HAVE SO MUCH POTENCIAL.
Waited a while for this game, exceeded my expectations
I get shot even tho i don’t move

developer_response.body:
The game has sensitive Hand Tracking and Body Tracking.

Hand Movements or rotations moving or rotating more than 0.05 units or 5 degrees eliminates you.

Same for the body and head movement and rotation.

-PHOZE

developer_response.body:
Dear Combopanda202,

Thank you for reaching out regarding your experience in the game. We sincerely apologize for the issues you've encountered. While we strive to address bugs and glitches, we require more context to assist effectively. Please feel free to contact me on Discord or via our business email Phozegames@gmail.com

Best regards,  
PHOZE
